title: 🎉 Grand Festival Sale — Up to 40% Off!
content: This week, celebrate with us! Get up to 40% off on all grocery essentials. Offer valid till Sunday midnight. Use code FESTIVAL40 at checkout.

title: Excellent service and fresh products!
content: Ordered Basmati Rice and Amul Milk yesterday. Everything was delivered fresh and on time. The packing was also very good. Highly recommend SK General Store to everyone! 👍

title: 📦 New Stock Alert — Fresh Arrivals!
content: We've restocked our Dairy section with fresh Amul products and added new premium snacks. Check out new arrivals in the app now!

title: Love the new app! 😍
content: The new SK General app is so easy to use. Found everything I needed in minutes. Cart and checkout was super smooth. Will definitely order again!
